name: Maternal minute ventilation at term
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: lomauro-aliverti-2015-respiratory. Technique: Spirometry / open-circuit indirect calorimetry. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, term.
notes: Resting minute ventilation at term; increased ~30-50% above non-pregnant baseline.

name: Pregnancy P50 shift
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: kelman-1966-o2-saturation. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, third trimester. Caveats: Reported shift varies by methodology and 2,3-BPG measurement; a 2-4 mmHg range is most commonly cited.
notes: Rightward shift in maternal oxyhaemoglobin P50 in pregnancy, attributed to elevated 2,3-BPG. Caveats: Reported shift varies by methodology and 2,3-BPG measurement; a 2-4 mmHg range is most commonly cited.

name: Maternal arterial PCO2 at term
tier_rationale: Tier A pending re-review. Source citation: lomauro-aliverti-2015-respiratory. Technique: Arterial blood-gas analysis. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, term. Caveats: Non-pregnant reference 40 mmHg; pregnancy reference 28-32 mmHg.
notes: Arterial PaCO2 at term; reduced by physiological hyperventilation. Caveats: Non-pregnant reference 40 mmHg; pregnancy reference 28-32 mmHg.

name: Maternal arterial PO2 at term
tier_rationale: Tier A pending re-review. Source citation: lomauro-aliverti-2015-respiratory. Technique: Arterial blood-gas analysis. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, term.
notes: Arterial PaO2 at term; mildly elevated relative to non-pregnant baseline.

name: Maternal tidal volume at term
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: crapo-1996-pregnancy-respiratory. Technique: Spirometry. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, term.
